UserObject.plantUmlData:
{
  "data": "@startuml
left to right direction

actor "Client User" as Client
actor "Ordering Team" as Ordering
actor "Procurement Manager" as Manager
actor "Supplier" as Supplier
actor "Inventory User" as Inventory
actor "Quality User" as Quality
actor "Finance User" as Finance
actor "Administrator" as Admin

rectangle "Centralized Procurement & Inventory Platform" {

  usecase "Login" as UC_Login
  usecase "Manage Users & Roles" as UC_UserRole
  usecase "Manage Client Organizations" as UC_ClientOrg

  usecase "Raise Procurement Requirement" as UC_Requirement
  usecase "Review Requirement" as UC_ReviewReq
  usecase "Check Available Inventory" as UC_CheckStock

  usecase "Create RFQ" as UC_CreateRFQ
  usecase "Publish RFQ to Suppliers" as UC_PublishRFQ
  usecase "View RFQ" as UC_ViewRFQ
  usecase "Submit Quotation" as UC_SubmitQuote
  usecase "Compare Quotations" as UC_Compare
  usecase "Score Suppliers" as UC_Score
  usecase "Recommend Supplier" as UC_Recommend
  usecase "Approve Supplier Selection" as UC_ApproveSupplier

  usecase "Generate Purchase Order" as UC_PO
  usecase "Acknowledge Purchase Order" as UC_AckPO

  usecase "Track Incoming Stock" as UC_IncomingStock
  usecase "Create Goods Receipt" as UC_GRN
  usecase "Record Storage Location" as UC_Storage
  usecase "Update Stock Status" as UC_StockStatus
  usecase "Perform Quality Inspection" as UC_Quality

  usecase "Evaluate Supplier Performance" as UC_EvaluateSupplier
  usecase "Submit Invoice" as UC_Invoice
  usecase "Verify Invoice" as UC_VerifyInvoice
  usecase "Track Payment Status" as UC_Payment

  usecase "View Spend Analysis" as UC_Spend
  usecase "View Dashboard & Reports" as UC_Dashboard
  usecase "View Notifications" as UC_Notifications
  usecase "View Audit Logs" as UC_Audit
}

Client --> UC_Login
Client --> UC_Requirement
Client --> UC_Dashboard
Client --> UC_Notifications

Ordering --> UC_Login
Ordering --> UC_ReviewReq
Ordering --> UC_CheckStock
Ordering --> UC_CreateRFQ
Ordering --> UC_PublishRFQ
Ordering --> UC_Compare
Ordering --> UC_Recommend
Ordering --> UC_PO
Ordering --> UC_Dashboard
Ordering --> UC_Notifications

Manager --> UC_Login
Manager --> UC_ApproveSupplier
Manager --> UC_Spend
Manager --> UC_Dashboard
Manager --> UC_Notifications

Supplier --> UC_Login
Supplier --> UC_ViewRFQ
Supplier --> UC_SubmitQuote
Supplier --> UC_AckPO
Supplier --> UC_Invoice
Supplier --> UC_Notifications

Inventory --> UC_Login
Inventory --> UC_IncomingStock
Inventory --> UC_GRN
Inventory --> UC_Storage
Inventory --> UC_StockStatus
Inventory --> UC_Dashboard
Inventory --> UC_Notifications

Quality --> UC_Login
Quality --> UC_Quality
Quality --> UC_EvaluateSupplier
Quality --> UC_Notifications

Finance --> UC_Login
Finance --> UC_VerifyInvoice
Finance --> UC_Payment
Finance --> UC_Spend
Finance --> UC_Dashboard
Finance --> UC_Notifications

Admin --> UC_Login
Admin --> UC_UserRole
Admin --> UC_ClientOrg
Admin --> UC_Audit
Admin --> UC_Dashboard

UC_Requirement ..> UC_CheckStock : <<include>>
UC_ReviewReq ..> UC_CreateRFQ : <<include>>
UC_CreateRFQ ..> UC_PublishRFQ : <<include>>

UC_SubmitQuote ..> UC_Compare : <<extend>>
UC_Compare ..> UC_Score : <<include>>
UC_Score ..> UC_Recommend : <<include>>
UC_Recommend ..> UC_ApproveSupplier : <<include>>

UC_ApproveSupplier ..> UC_PO : <<include>>
UC_PO ..> UC_IncomingStock : <<include>>
UC_GRN ..> UC_Storage : <<include>>
UC_GRN ..> UC_StockStatus : <<include>>
UC_GRN ..> UC_Quality : <<include>>

UC_Quality ..> UC_EvaluateSupplier : <<include>>
UC_VerifyInvoice ..> UC_Payment : <<include>>
UC_VerifyInvoice ..> UC_PO : <<include>>
UC_VerifyInvoice ..> UC_GRN : <<include>>

UC_PO ..> UC_Spend : <<include>>
UC_Payment ..> UC_Spend : <<include>>

@enduml",
  "format": "svg"
}
